name: datatable-update-pattern
description: DataTable widgets need on_mount to add_columns before update methods populate rows; update methods should clear() then add_row() with key for cursor tracking

name: screen-stack-navigation
description: Textual screen stack navigation: QueueScreen shows all runs in DataTable, RunDetailScreen shows single run detail with PipelineBar, AgentTable, SubtaskTable, AgentLog. Use push_screen/pop_screen for navigation, set_interval for polling.

name: pipeline-bar-states
description: PipelineBar widget handles multiple run states: queued shows QUEUED, cancelled shows CANCELLED, completed shows COMPLETED, failed shows FAILED, executing highlights current phase. Uses reactive run_state property.
